Best Goalkeepers21st century
▼GOAT1
1 Manuel Neuer — Bayern Munich, Germany The Gold Standard.
▼Legend6
2 Petr Cech — Chelsea, Czechia Brave, wily, instinctive
3 Thibaut Courtois — Real Madrid, Chelsea, Atletico Madrid, Belgium Colossus
4 Gianluigi Buffon — Juventus, Italy WC '06 saved his legacy
5 Alisson — Liverpool, Brazil lightning speed diving/covering space horizontally
6 Iker Casillas — Real Madrid, Spain 2x Euro, 1x World Cup
7 Oliver Kahn — Bayern Munich, Germany that howler in the '02 final costs him
▼World Class6
8 Keylor Navas — Real Madrid, Costa Rica cat
9 David Raya — Arsenal, Spain Best both on-ball & cross-collecting
10 Emi Martinez — Aston Villa, Argentina the most perfect South American tournament keeper God ever created.
11 Ederson — Man City, Brazil the best half-volley / sideways punter i have witnessed
12 Edwin van der Sar — Man United, Netherlands gangly old bastard
13 Jan Oblak — Atletico Madrid, Slovenia brilliant shot-stopper but it's tough when messi, ronaldo, suarez, neymar, bale, benzema etc are peppering your net
▼Elite5
14 Gianluigi Donnarumma — PSG, AC Milan, Man City, Italy the Italian Emi Martinez.
15 Samir Handanovic — Internazionale, Slovenia
16 Marc-Andre ter Stegen — Barcelona, Germany what does his career look like if Manu Neuer doesn't exist?
17 Jens Lehmann — Arsenal, Germany a literal insane person
18 David De Gea — Man United, Spain
